texto: Perhaps even atheism versus theism is an example of this principle that an apparent either/or can really be a both/and. For I suspect that the God you insist does not exist is probably a God I also insist does not exist
autor: and perhaps the God I maintain does exist is a God you have never denied.
explicacao: Citação de and perhaps the God I maintain does exist is a God you have never denied. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Perhaps even atheism versus theism is an example of this principle that an apparent either/or can…” articula reflexao, peter-kreeft, insist em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como estudos e reflexao.
